perturbation.original_text: PAYMENT. Except as may be specifically authorized in writing by NETGEAR, and subject to NETGEAR's continuing approval of Distributor's credit status and financial condition, Distributor will pay NETGEAR for all Products ordered by Distributor within [*] of the date the corresponding invoice is issued by NETGEAR. The foregoing notwithstanding, the parties agree that payment for the initial order placed by Distributor under this Agreement shall be due and payable within [*] of the date the corresponding invoice is issued by NETGEAR. NETGEAR, in its sole discretion, reserves the right to specify, and to change from time to time, Distributor's credit line and payment terms. All payments are to be made in U.S. dollars. Payment for shipments made outside of the United States shall be made by wire transfer in accordance with wire transfer procedures provided by NETGEAR. If at any time Distributor is delinquent in the payment of any invoice, exceeds the credit line established by NETGEAR, or is otherwise in breach of the Agreement, NETGEAR may, in its discretion, withhold shipment (including partial shipments) of any order or may require Distributor to pay cash on delivery for further shipments. Payment not received by NETGEAR when due may be subject to a late payment INGRAM NETGEAR Distributor Agreement 3 083096 service charge provided NETGEAR has provided 10 days written notice to Distributor of Distributor's failure to pay. The foregoing notwithstanding, Distributor shall not be deemed in default under this provision if Distributor withholds payment of amounts legitimately in dispute on any invoice provided that (1) Distributor promptly pays the undisputed portion of the invoice in accordance with the terms of this Agreement; (2) Distributor provides NETGEAR with written notice of the disputed amount within 10 days of receipt of the invoice; and (3) Distributor works in good faith with NETGEAR to resolve any dispute within a reasonable time period.
perturbation.changed_text: PAYMENT. Except as may be specifically authorized in writing by NETGEAR, and subject to NETGEAR's continuing approval of Distributor's credit status and financial condition, Distributor will pay NETGEAR for all Products ordered by Distributor as NETGEAR sees fit. The foregoing notwithstanding, the parties agree that payment for the initial order placed by Distributor under this Agreement shall be due and payable as NETGEAR sees fit. NETGEAR, in its sole discretion, reserves the right to specify, and to change from time to time, Distributor's credit line and payment terms. All payments are to be made in U.S. dollars. Payment for shipments made outside of the United States shall be made by wire transfer in accordance with wire transfer procedures provided by NETGEAR. If at any time Distributor is delinquent in the payment of any invoice, exceeds the credit line established by NETGEAR, or is otherwise in breach of the Agreement, NETGEAR may, in its discretion, withhold shipment (including partial shipments) of any order or may require Distributor to pay cash on delivery for further shipments. Payment not received by NETGEAR when due may be subject to a late payment INGRAM NETGEAR Distributor Agreement 3 083096 service charge provided NETGEAR has provided 10 days written notice to Distributor of Distributor's failure to pay. The foregoing notwithstanding, Distributor shall not be deemed in default under this provision if Distributor withholds payment of amounts legitimately in dispute on any invoice provided that (1) Distributor promptly pays the undisputed portion of the invoice in accordance with the terms of this Agreement; (2) Distributor provides NETGEAR with written notice of the disputed amount within 10 days of receipt of the invoice; and (3) Distributor works in good faith with NETGEAR to resolve any dispute within a reasonable time period.
perturbation.explanation: By changing the original text, "Distributor will pay NETGEAR for all Products ordered by Distributor within [*] of the date the corresponding invoice is issued by NETGEAR," to "Distributor will pay NETGEAR for all Products ordered by Distributor as NETGEAR sees fit," it introduces ambiguity. The removal of the payment term (within [*] days) and replacing it with the text (as NETGEAR sees fit) makes the PAYMENT section contradictory. The rest of the original PAYMENT section is being contradicted. The rest of the PAYMENT section talks about distributor default if the payments are not received when due, but the payment term is now ambigious.
perturbation.contradicted_text: E. PAYMENT. Except as may be specifically authorized in writing by NETGEAR, and subject to NETGEAR's continuing approval of Distributor's credit status and financial condition, Distributor will pay NETGEAR for all Products ordered by Distributor as NETGEAR sees fit. The foregoing notwithstanding, the parties agree that payment for the initial order placed by Distributor under this Agreement shall be due and payable as NETGEAR sees fit. NETGEAR, in its sole discretion, reserves the right to specify, and to change from time to time, Distributor's credit line and payment terms. All payments are to be made in U.S. dollars. Payment for shipments made outside of the United States shall be made by wire transfer in accordance with wire transfer procedures provided by NETGEAR. If at any time Distributor is delinquent in the payment of any invoice, exceeds the credit line established by NETGEAR, or is otherwise in breach of the Agreement, NETGEAR may, in its discretion, withhold shipment (including partial shipments) of any order or may require Distributor to pay cash on delivery for further shipments. Payment not received by NETGEAR when due may be subject to a late payment INGRAM NETGEAR Distributor Agreement 3 083096 service charge provided NETGEAR has provided 10 days written notice to Distributor of Distributor's failure to pay. The foregoing notwithstanding, Distributor shall not be deemed in default under this provision if Distributor withholds payment of amounts legitimately in dispute on any invoice provided that (1) Distributor promptly pays the undisputed portion of the invoice in accordance with the terms of this Agreement; (2) Distributor provides NETGEAR with written notice of the disputed amount within 10 days of receipt of the invoice; and (3) Distributor works in good faith with NETGEAR to resolve any dispute within a reasonable time period.
perturbation.justification: The changed text replaces a specific payment timeframe with 'as NETGEAR sees fit,' creating ambiguity. This directly contradicts the rest of the payment section, which refers to 'payment not received by NETGEAR when due' and the consequences of late payment. The original text provided a specific due date based on invoice date, which is now removed, making the 'when due' clause unenforceable and contradictory. Therefore, it causes a strong in-text contradiction based on Omissions - In Text Contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: A. TERM. This Agreement will be in effect for one year from the Effective Date and will automatically renew for successive one (1) year periods unless terminated as provided below. B. TERMINATION. This Agreement may be canceled at any time without cause, by either party upon ninety (90) days written notice to the other party. Either party may terminate this Agreement immediately if (i) the other party becomes insolvent, files or has filed against it a petition in bankruptcy, or ceases doing business; or (ii) the other party fails to cure a material breach of the Agreement within thirty (30) days after receipt of written notice of such breach from the party not in default. Upon termination of the Agreement by NETGEAR for Distributor's breach, NETGEAR may cancel all of Distributor's unfulfilled orders without further obligation. This Agreement may be terminated at any time without cause by either party upon ninety (90) days written notice to the other party.
perturbation.changed_text: A. TERM. This Agreement will be in effect for one year from the Effective Date and will automatically renew for successive one (1) year periods unless terminated as provided below. B. TERMINATION. This Agreement may be canceled at any time without cause, by either party without notice to the other party. Either party may terminate this Agreement immediately if (i) the other party becomes insolvent, files or has filed against it a petition in bankruptcy, or ceases doing business; or (ii) the other party fails to cure a material breach of the Agreement as NETGEAR sees fit. Upon termination of the Agreement by NETGEAR for Distributor's breach, NETGEAR may cancel all of Distributor's unfulfilled orders without further obligation. This Agreement may be terminated at any time without cause by either party upon ninety (90) days written notice to the other party.
perturbation.explanation: By removing "upon ninety (90) days written notice to the other party" and adding the phrase "without notice to the other party" to point B TERMINATION introduces ambiguity and in-text contradiction. As well by changing the original text, "the other party fails to cure a material breach of the Agreement within thirty (30) days after receipt of written notice of such breach from the party not in default" to "the other party fails to cure a material breach of the Agreement as NETGEAR sees fit," the TERM AND TERMINATION sections are contradictory since one paragraph states that the agreement can be terminated only with written notice and another paragraph states it can be terminated without notice. This affects the termination of the agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: B. TERMINATION. This Agreement may be canceled at any time without cause, by either party without notice to the other party. Either party may terminate this Agreement immediately if (i) the other party becomes insolvent, files or has filed against it a petition in bankruptcy, or ceases doing business; or (ii) the other party fails to cure a material breach of the Agreement as NETGEAR sees fit. Upon termination of the Agreement by NETGEAR for Distributor's breach, NETGEAR may cancel all of Distributor's unfulfilled orders without further obligation. This Agreement may be terminated at any time without cause by either party upon ninety (90) days written notice to the other party.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a contradiction regarding the termination of the agreement. The original text states that termination without cause requires ninety (90) days written notice. The changed text modifies this to allow termination without notice, and in addition states, 'This Agreement may be terminated at any time without cause by either party upon ninety (90) days written notice to the other party.' This directly contradicts the earlier statement in the same section allowing termination without any notice, creating a clear inconsistency and ambiguity about the required notice period for termination without cause. Therefore, the changed text causes a strong in-text contradiction.
